## What's new

* Added a new VLC-based video player with improved codec support and playback reliability.
* Videos can now be played or paused by clicking directly on the player.
* Improved keyboard shortcut handling to avoid unintended actions.
* Improved how application settings are stored and persisted.
* Audio settings are now saved between sessions.

## Fixes

* Fixed playback resetting when leaving a recording or quickly switching between videos.
* Fixed flickering while the first video frame is loading.
* Videos now pause when the app is minimized.
* Fixed playback controls not working correctly after a video reaches the end.
